tagline: Cloud & Data Engineer building ETL pipelines, streaming systems, and AI-integrated applications on AWS and Azure.
description: Cloud & Data Engineer with 3+ years delivering cloud-native ETL pipelines, streaming systems, and AI-integrated applications. MS Data Science @ University at Buffalo.

roles.detailed: Cloud & Data Engineer | Python, SQL, AWS, PySpark, Kafka | Open to Summer 2026 & Full-Time Roles

bio: Cloud & Data Engineer with 3+ years delivering cloud-native ETL pipelines, streaming systems, and AI-integrated applications on AWS and Azure. Achieved 40% throughput gains, 65% faster batch runtimes, and 99.8% uptime. Currently contributing to deepfake detection research at the Institute for Artificial Intelligence and Data Science, University at Buffalo, under Prof. Siwei Lyu (IEEE Fellow). Experienced with Python, SQL, PySpark, Kafka, Airflow, AWS, Azure, Snowflake, Flask, FastAPI, Docker, Tableau, and Power BI. Open to Data Engineering, Data Science, and Software Engineering roles.

experience.company: Institute for Artificial Intelligence and Data Science · University at Buffalo
bullets: Developed React, Flask, and Jinja frontend/backend components for AI-driven application workflows.
Built REST APIs for real-time ML inference; reduced latency from 580ms to 378ms (+28% throughput).
Engineered PySpark workflows on 100GB+ datasets; cut runtime by 60% via partitioning and broadcast joins.
Architected Python ETL pipelines ingesting 50K+ multi-modal records into AWS S3 for Deep-O-Meter.
Implemented MLflow versioning and data lineage across 10+ configs; reduced QA effort by 30%.
experience.desc: Research at the Institute for Artificial Intelligence and Data Science, University at Buffalo, under Prof. Siwei Lyu (IEEE Fellow).

bullets: Managed document delivery workflows including scanning, processing, and distribution of materials.
Assisted users with library systems, technology tools, and service workflows.
Maintained accuracy through detailed record-keeping and verification processes.
Handled high-volume requests ensuring timely fulfillment and organized processing.
experience.desc: Campus library operations, document delivery, and user support.

bullets: Monitored equipment usage and enforced safety protocols across fitness facilities.
Supported daily operations including equipment checks and maintenance coordination.
Delivered high-quality customer service assisting users with equipment and policies.
Maintained cleanliness and operational standards; coordinated proactively with staff.
experience.desc: Fitness facility operations, safety, and member support at UB.

bullets: Engineered AWS and SFTP pipelines processing 200+ files/day; improved throughput by 40% and saved 15 hrs/week.
Maintained Sterling File Gateway enterprise workflows with 99.8% system uptime across 12+ pipelines.
Optimized 20+ SQL queries and redesigned schemas; reduced analytics query latency by 30%.
Built monitoring and validation frameworks (CloudWatch + PagerDuty); cut incident response by 25%.
Instituted CI/CD test suites across 15+ workflows, cutting post-deployment defects by 40%.
experience.desc: Enterprise cloud data engineering, SOX-compliant pipelines, and production observability.

bullets: Built Python ETL pipelines ingesting 500K+ records from 10+ sources; reduced processing time by 45%.
Designed relational schemas and indexing strategies; improved query performance by 60%.
Developed 15+ Tableau and Power BI dashboards; reduced manual reporting by 6 hrs/week.
Implemented data validation frameworks ensuring 99.5% accuracy across 2M+ records.
experience.desc: End-to-end data pipelines, analytics dashboards, and database optimization for clients.

bullets: Completed client-style Power BI case study analyzing business data and KPI trends.
Built interactive dashboards with drill-down views for executive decision support.
Applied data modeling and DAX measures for revenue and operational metrics.
experience.desc: PwC virtual case experience in Power BI analytics and business insights.

experience.role: Data Visualisation — Empowering Business With Effective Insights
bullets: Analyzed automotive sector datasets and identified trends for business stakeholders.
Designed effective visualizations communicating insights to non-technical audiences.
Applied storytelling techniques to translate data into actionable recommendations.
experience.desc: Tata Technologies virtual program in data visualization and business insight delivery.

bullets: Led weekly technical seminars and hands-on activities for student skill development in IT.
Established internships with professionals and direct interaction with DRDO scientists.
Increased internship and job placement rates through coding, cryptography, and problem-solving programs.

projects.title: AI Data Analyst Chatbot
